# labeledSensorData(featureColumns:labelColumn:recordingFileColumn:)

**Instance Method**

Generates a data table from the contents of the data source.

## Declaration

```swift
func labeledSensorData(featureColumns: [String], labelColumn: String? = nil, recordingFileColumn: String? = nil) throws -> MLDataTable
```

## Parameters

- **featureColumns**: The names of the feature columns the method includes in the [doc://com.apple.createml/documentation/CreateML/MLDataTable] it generates.
- **labelColumn**: The name of the label column. This parameter must not be `nil` if the data source uses [doc://com.apple.createml/documentation/CreateML/MLActivityClassifier/DataSource/directoryWithDataAndAnnotation(at:annotationFileName:timeStampColumn:labelStartTimeColumn:labelEndTimeColumn:)].
- **recordingFileColumn**: The name of the column with the recording file names. This parameter must not be `nil` if the data source uses [doc://com.apple.createml/documentation/CreateML/MLActivityClassifier/DataSource/directoryWithDataAndAnnotation(at:annotationFileName:timeStampColumn:labelStartTimeColumn:labelEndTimeColumn:)].

## Return Value

A new [doc://com.apple.createml/documentation/CreateML/MLDataTable] instance.

## Discussion

The `labelColumn` and `recordingFileColumn` parameters are optional if the data source is [doc://com.apple.createml/documentation/CreateML/MLActivityClassifier/DataSource/labeledDirectories(at:)]. If `nil`, the method names the data table’s label column and data file column “label” and “recordingFile”, respectively.

## Generating data tables from a data source

- **stratifiedSplit(proportions:seed:featureColumns:labelColumn:recordingFileColumn:)**: Generates a data table by splitting the data source into strata.
